## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `security` — security fix
- [ ] `chore` / `ci` / `deps`

## Security checklist
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or PII hardcoded in source
- [ ] Forms validate input before submission
- [ ] No cross-site scripting vectors (dangerouslySetInnerHTML etc.)
- [ ] Auth-protected routes have `PrivateRoute` guard
